center.name: 夏爾·迪蒙·德聖克魯瓦
center.summary: 夏爾·迪蒙·德聖克魯瓦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括黑冠鹃隼、Black-collared barbet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-collared barbet (Lybius torquatus) is a species of bird in the family Lybiidae which is native to sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black baza (Aviceda leuphotes) is a small bird of prey found in the forests of Northeast India, the eastern Himalayas, China and Southeast Asia
